title: Assignments to a concatenation are treated as separate assignments to each element of the concatenation

features.name: concatenation assignment with addition event expression
features.description: Code should include a concatenation assignment like {x, y} = 2'b01 where x and y are individual reg variables, combined with an always @(x + y) event expression that uses the addition operator

features.name: multiple reg variables in arithmetic event expression
features.description: Code should include an event expression that uses multiple reg variables combined with an arithmetic operator (not bitwise XOR), where those same variables are targets of a concatenation assignment
